summary: The diff implements REQ-2 (gating profile query behind actor/auth readiness in useGetCallerUserProfile.ts and App.tsx state machine) but does NOT implement REQ-1 (fixing the duplicate agent/agentOptions conflict in useActor.ts). The constraint explicitly states useActor.ts is immutable, but the requirement still asks for a wrapper or calling-code fix — no such fix appears in the diff. useActor.ts is not modified and no wrapper is introduced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the actor creation logic so that it never passes both agent and agentOptions simultaneously to createActor. When an authenticated identity/agent is available, pass only the agent parameter. When no identity is available, pass only agentOptions. The fix may be in a wrapper or calling code rather than useActor.ts directly.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to useActor.ts are present in the diff, and no wrapper or calling-code fix that intercepts or corrects the agent/agentOptions conflict was introduced. The diff only modifies App.tsx, useGetCallerUserProfile.ts, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json, none of which address the duplicate agent/agentOptions issue in actor creation.
